1.12.2.0.7.0: [!] WARNING: May require updating Fluidlogged API to v3.0.0. [+] Added support for Fluidlogged API 3.0.0.
1.12.2.0.6.1: [API] Fixed wrong type for PurifiedWater in the API. [+] Added Dynamic Trees compatibility for fluid blocks.
1.12.2.0.6.0: [+] Added Serene Seasons support for ice melting and freezing.
1.12.2.0.5.9: [+] Added regular/salt water ice and world generator. [+] Implemented regular/salt ice melting and freezing.
1.12.2.0.5.8: [+] Ignored Spice of Life: Carrot Edition modifier in max health calculation. [+] Removed fluid particle effects to improve performance.
1.12.2.0.5.7: [FIX] Fixed Hypothermia/Hyperthermia giving negative max health values. [+] Added compatibility for other mods tweaking max health.
1.12.2.0.5.6: [!] Hypothermia/Hyperthermia now reduce max health and apply negative potion effects instead of dealing direct damage.
1.12.2.0.5.5: [!] Temperature effects now lower max health instead of dealing direct damage.
1.12.2.0.5.4: [+] Unified water light opacity to improve performance. [FIX] Temperature effects are no longer deadly.
1.12.2.0.5.3: [FIX] Fixed water fog rendering error. [+] Improved water fog visuals (color is brighter and biome-dependent).
1.12.2.0.5.2: [+] Improved water fog visuals (color is brighter and biome-dependent).
1.12.2.0.5.0: [FIX] Fixed water fog rendering. [+] Reduced fluid mixing speed.
1.12.2.0.4.9: [FIX] Reverted default water color change. [FIX] Fixed salt water localization.
1.12.2.0.4.8: [+] Improved and optimized fluid mixing algorithm. [!] Changed default color of fresh/salt water.
1.12.2.0.4.7: [+] Added saltwater/freshwater mixing logic. [+] Added Greenery mod support.
1.12.2.0.4.6: [+] Added optional Fluidlogged API support (Requires v1.7.2b or higher).
1.12.2.0.4.5: [+] Added Streams mod compatibility. [!] Changed canteen recipe output to Spring Water.
1.12.2.0.4.4: [FIX] Fixed bug where normal and purified water had inverted effects.
1.12.2.0.4.3: [!] Normal water is now finite. [+] Aligned basic fluid colors with vanilla water. [+] Added fog color handler. [+] Added Dynamic Trees - Biomes O' Plenty Rooty Water support.
1.12.2.0.4.2: [!] Renamed Purified Water to Regular Water, and Normal Water to Spring Water. [!] Spring Water is now finite.
1.12.2.0.4.1: [+] Added saltwater fluid, block, bottle, and canteens.
1.12.2.0.4.0: [+] Added purified water biome color handler. [+] Added default color for Purified Water. [+] Added Backported Flora compatibility. [+] Added purifiedWaterOpacity config option.
1.12.2.0.3.9: [+] Added config for infinite purified water. [FIX] Resolved crash/error with Inspirations mod.
1.12.2.0.3.8: [+] Added Inspirations compatibility. [+] Increased Heater output. [FIX] Resolved dimension-specific temperature issues. [FIX] General bug fixes.
1.12.2.0.3.7: [+] Drinks are now stackable. [+] Added Iron Canteen. [+] New art and textures. [+] Added extra items.
1.12.2.0.3.6: [FIX] Resolved campfire bugs. [+] Implemented scaling temperature damage. [FIX] Fixed JSON ReadOnly compatibility issues.
1.12.2.0.3.5: [+] Massive art and texture update. [+] New configuration options. [+] Added Russian localization.
1.12.2.0.3.4: [+] Added Campfire Spit blacklist. [+] Improved CraftTweaker compatibility. [+] Updated Simplified Chinese translation.
1.12.2.0.3.3: [FIX] Fixed various Canteen bugs. [+] Added potion icons to HUD.
1.12.2.0.3.2: [+] Added Campfire Spit. [+] Added Baubles compatibility. [+] Added Parasites compatibility. [+] More config options. [API] Added Canteen API for modders.
1.12.2.0.3.1: [+] Added Simplified Chinese localization. [API] Various API fixes for mod developers.
1.12.2.0.3.0: [+] Added Rustic & Pyrotech compatibility. [+] Implemented cauldron drinking. [+] Various new features and improvements. (Full details on CurseForge)
1.12.2.0.2.4: [FIX] Critical: Resolved server startup crash present since 0.1.0.
1.12.2.0.2.3: [+] Added OreExcavation & Tinkers' Construct compatibility. [+] Reskinned Ice Armor. [+] Added Thermometer HUD config. [FIX] General bug fixes.
1.12.2.0.2.2: [+] Added ArmorUnderwear, HarvestCraft, & Harvest Festival compatibility. [+] Added held item temperature mechanics. [+] Added Thirst config options. [+] Added help commands.
1.12.2.0.2.1: [+] Added in-game JSON editing and saving capabilities.
1.12.2.0.2.0: [+] Implemented stacking temperatures. [!] JSON format changes (check CurseForge for migration details).
1.12.2.0.1.1: [+] Added Update Checker. [+] Mod compatibility updates. [+] Added Thermometer HUD. [+] Configurable water temperatures for other mods.
